description: Heavy-duty 80V two-stage snow blower for serious snowfall. Clears up to 18-car driveway on a charge. More torque than 60V models for packed snow.

name: Greenworks 60V 20" Snow Blower Kit (5.0Ah)
description: Entry-level 60V snow blower for light to moderate snowfall. 20-inch clearing path handles standard residential driveways.

name: Greenworks 40V 24" Hedge Trimmer Kit (2.0Ah)
description: 40V hedge trimmer with 24-inch dual-action blade. More power than 24V models for thicker hedges.

name: Toro 60V 8" Brushless Stick Edger Kit (2.5Ah)
description: Dedicated 60V stick edger for clean, professional-looking edges along driveways and sidewalks. Depth guide wheel for consistent cuts.

name: Toro 60V Power Max 26" Two-Stage Snow Blower Kit
description: Toro's most powerful battery snow blower. Two-stage system handles heavy, wet snow up to 20 inches deep. Clears up to a 45-car driveway equivalent.

name: ECHO eFORCE 56V Pro Attachment Power Head Kit (5.0Ah)
description: ECHO's Pro Attachment Series powerhead for the eFORCE system. Accepts 8+ attachments including trimmer, edger, pole saw, hedge trimmer, and blower.

name: WORX 40V 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit (2x 4.0Ah)
description: WORX's mid-tier self-propelled mower with IntelliCut technology. Two 20V batteries combine for 40V power to handle medium yards.

name: WORX 20V 8" Pole Saw with Auto-Tension Kit (2.0Ah)
description: Lightweight pole saw reaching up to 13 feet. Auto-tension chain system keeps the chain at proper tension without manual adjustment.
